 Southern British Columbia

Blessed with an abundance of diverse destinations; urban getaways, world-class golf and ski resorts, remote island lodges, Helijet has the equipment, manpower and training to suit your needs whether you’re looking for a leisure or business flight, support for natural resource and industrial operations to any destination.

[/vc_column_text][divider line_type=”No Line”][image_with_animation image_url=”889″ image_size=”full” animation_type=”entrance” animation=”Fade In” animation_easing=”default” animation_movement_type=”transform_y” hover_animation=”none” alignment=”center” border_radius=”none” box_shadow=”none” image_loading=”default” max_width=”100%” max_width_mobile=”default”][divider line_type=”No Line”][vc_column_text text_direction=”default”]

From the hanger, headquartered in Richmond at the YVR South Airport Helijet operates:

  • Sikorsky S76 helicopters, 12 passenger seating, twin-engine aircraft operated with two pilots, for scheduled and charter flights
  • Cessna Citation X, with spacious seating for up to 8 guests with lavatory
  • Learjet 31A, with seating for up to six guests, limited luggage

Estimated times and rates between YVR and other popular local airports and key destinations (based on Sikorsky S76)[/vc_column_text][divider line_type=”No Line”][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]

Vancouver Island

  • Victoria Harbour Heliport: 30 minutes
  • Victoria International Airport: 25 minutes
  • Nanaimo Harbour Heliport: 20 minutes
  • Comox Airport: 35 minutes

Fraser Valley

  • Abbotsford International Airport: 15 minutes
  • Chilliwack Airport: 25 minutes

Sea-to-Sky

  • Squamish Airport: 20 minutes
  • Whistler Heliport: 35 minutes
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][divider line_type=”No Line”][vc_column_text text_direction=”default”]For custom charter quotes, bookings or more information on how Helijet’s skills, comfort and style can enhance your experience please contact:

Helijet Charters Richmond:
charters [at] helijet.to.com*

*To help us provide you with a prompt and detailed reply, please be sure that your email included the following details:  
1. Departure airport/heliport*
2. Destination airport/heliport*
3. Desired date/time(s)
4. Number of passengers and estimated baggage
5. Preferred Aircraft Type Helicopter: Sikorsky S76 (12 seats) or Fixed Wing: Learjet 31A or Cessna Citation X 

 

At this time, Helijet Charters does not offer tickets for sightseeing tours or excursions.
*Any non-airport/heliport destinations or departure points may require at least 60 days lead time for permits to be applied for and permissions granted by Transport Canada and other stakeholders. Any requests within that time frame may not be actioned.
